seoTitle: How to Submit a Zendesk Ticket Manually as an Agent
metaDescription: Learn how to submit a Zendesk ticket manually for offline interactions, including setting the requester, assignee, subject, and initial status.
intro: Not every support interaction starts as an email or chat — sometimes an agent needs to log a phone call or in-person conversation manually. This guide walks through creating a fresh ticket from scratch in Zendesk, from identifying the requester to submitting it with the correct status.

steps.heading: Open a new ticket tab
steps.body: Click the + Add tab control in the top navigation bar to launch a blank, unassigned ticket.

steps.heading: Set the requester
steps.body: Search your existing contact registry for the customer, or register a new external user if they aren't already in the system.

steps.heading: Assign ownership
steps.body: Designate the specific group or individual agent responsible for handling the issue.

steps.heading: Write the subject and details
steps.body: Compose a clear subject line and document the issue, keeping public notes separate from any internal team comments.

steps.heading: Apply categories and tags
steps.body: Adjust dropdowns for type, priority, and brand, and apply any quick tags relevant to the issue.

steps.heading: Submit the ticket
steps.body: Use the status dropdown to submit the record as New, Open, or Pending, finalizing the ticket in your queue.

faq.question: Can I create a ticket for a customer who isn't in the system yet?
faq.answer: Yes, you can register a new external user handle directly while mapping the requester field.

faq.question: What status should I use when submitting a manual ticket?
faq.answer: It depends on the situation; use New for a fresh unhandled case, or Pending if you're waiting on the customer for more information.

faq.question: Do manual tickets update the customer's profile automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, manual ticket inputs update background customer profile records in the same way tickets created through other channels do.

faq.question: Can I set the ticket priority when creating it manually?
faq.answer: Yes, priority is one of the parameter dropdowns available alongside type and brand labels.
